title: Marinara-RPG-RP-Mode-Extension Ruleset Bundle
description: A single-file install bundle that wraps a ruleset, GM agent prompt, and lorebook in one envelope. Pasted into the extension's ruleset dialog to auto-install all three pieces via Marinara's API.

schema.description: Discriminator the extension uses to route bundle vs plain ruleset paste.

version.description: Bundle envelope version. Bump for breaking schema changes; readers refuse unknown versions.

minExtensionVersion.description: Optional. If set, the framework refuses to install when its own version is lower (e.g., "0.3.0").

authorId.description: Optional namespace for distinguishing same-id rulesets from different authors. Defaults to "local". Used in idempotency keys.

generator.description: Optional metadata about what tool produced the bundle (helpful for triage).

ruleset.description: Full ruleset.json content. Validated against the ruleset schema separately.

gmAgent.description: Custom Marinara agent that injects ruleset prose into pre-generation context.

name.description: Display name. Will be prefixed with "MRRP: " by the installer for grouping.

promptTemplate.description: Prose handed to the LLM as system context before each turn. Will be prefixed with [mrrp-v1:<authorId>/<rulesetId>] for idempotent re-install.

settings.description: Optional agent settings. The installer sets mrrpManaged: true and mrrpBundleSchema: "mrrp-bundle" automatically.

additionalAgents.description: Optional additional pre_generation context_injection agents installed alongside the main gmAgent. Each provides a focused capability (state-reminder, combat-adjudicator, lore-query, npc-bookkeeper, etc). Idempotency: each agent's settings carry mrrpAgentRole=<role> so re-install matches by (rulesetId, role).

role.description: Stable identifier for this agent within the bundle (e.g. "state-reminder", "combat-adjudicator"). Used in idempotency keys.

name.description: Display name. Prefixed with "MRRP: " by the installer.

promptTemplate.description: Prose handed to the LLM as system context. Prefixed with [mrrp-v1:<authorId>/<rulesetId>:<role>] for idempotent re-install.

settings.description: Optional agent settings. The installer sets mrrpManaged, mrrpBundleSchema, mrrpRulesetId, mrrpAuthorId, mrrpAgentRole automatically.

lorebook.description: Lorebook + entries auto-imported into Marinara's lorebook database.

position.description: 0 = before character defs (system context), 1 = after, 2 = depth-injected (uses depth field).
